drug_name: Premier Value Chewable Antacid Assorted Fruit
indications_and_usage: Uses relieves: • heartburn • sour stomach • acid indigestion • upset stomach associated with these symptoms
dosage_and_administration: Directions • adults and children 12 years of age and over: chew 2-4 tablets as symptoms occur, or as directed by a doctor. Do not swallow tablets whole. • do not take for symptoms that persist for more than 2 weeks unless advised by a doctor
